title: Decrease-and-Conquer Algorithm Strategy
description: A flowchart illustrating the recursive and iterative process of solving a problem by reducing its size and conquering the smaller subproblem.
elements: Reduced Problem of size n-1 (or n-c)
relationships: Decrease the problem size to create a smaller instance
Solve the smaller instance recursively or iteratively
Use the solution to the smaller instance to construct the solution to the original problem
